temporal_description: The audio is dominated by a deep, resonant, and ominous rumbling sound, like the distant, heavy thrumming of a powerful, ancient machine or the low growl of a massive, unseen force. The video opens with a close-up, over-the-shoulder shot of a young man with light brown hair, looking towards a young woman. The woman, with long, wavy brown hair, stands in a dark, stone-walled corridor. She wears a dark, high-collared coat and looks up with a concerned expression, her arms slightly outstretched. In the background, a dark, arched doorway is visible, and a figure can be seen moving within it. The lighting is dim and moody, casting deep shadows on the rough-hewn stone walls. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the top right corner. The camera cuts to a tight, close-up shot of two hands reaching towards each other. The hands are pale and veiny, with fingers splayed as if trying to grasp or push something away. The hands are framed by the same dark, stone-like texture, creating a sense of confinement. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The shot changes to a low-angle view of a group of figures in full, dark armor. They stand in a formation, their helmets obscuring their faces. The armor is imposing and detailed, with some figures holding spears. The background is a dark, cloudy, and indistinct space, suggesting a large, enclosed, and possibly cavernous environment. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right. The camera slowly pans across the line of armored figures, emphasizing their stoic and menacing presence. The sound is continuous and creates a powerful sense of suspense and foreboding, as if building up to a momentous and threatening event. There is no dialogue or other discernible sound effects, allowing the deep, atmospheric rumble to fill the entire soundscape.
